details.address: 921 Crossroads Plaza Suite 30, Fort Mill, SC 29708

raw_data.address: 921 Crossroads Plaza Suite 30, Fort Mill, SC 29708
raw_data.name: J Tea (Tega Cay)

reviews_data.review_text: I love Vietnamese coffee and Thai tea — I asked the lovely folks if they could mix them, they said they have never done that but they’ll give it a shot. It is… literally the best thing in the world. I’ve been smiling for like 5 minutes, I’m so jazzed about it. Yall are so sweet and this made my super rough day so much better. Thank yall again 💛💛💛

The only boba place I’ll go to here in the area! They make the best drinks and boba! My favorite is their j milk tea, but all the drinks I’ve had are amazing. The tapioca boba is always fully cooked (unlike Kung fu tea down the road) and the staff here is so kind. The sandwiches are also delicious especially the pork roll. Could not recommend this place enough!
I love j tea it’s so good and the managers are so nice!!

My girlfriend and I have gotten very into boba in the last few weeks. We have tried probably 10 spots in the Charlotte area, and this is by far our favorite. They’re so nice every time we go in, as well.
Best boba tea I have ever had! The staff is also incredibly nice and helpful!
Best Boba in town.
Bahn Mi was great. Bread was exceptional
Had the sea salt coffee, peachy breeze, and J special Banh Mi (dac biet).. all were delicious! I'll definitely be back ;)
Lovely little boba tea place hidden away in fort mill, The yogurt boba is to die for and I tried a bahn mi sandwich for the first time here and it was delicious! Absolutely on my lunch roster now.
We go Here ALL the time its always so refreshing SUCH good quality ingredients not filled with sugar. Definitely one of the way better bubble tea ive had. Staff is extremely friendly! Love this place
The Vietnamese sandwiches are so fresh and unique. I try to treat myself once a week and always look forward to it.
Great service and menu options. 🤍
the best
Incredible bahn mi, incredible drinks, incredible atmosphere and service. Highly recommend the absolute passion fruit drink and the dau hu sandwich.

I can't sing this place's praises enough. The drinks and sandwiches are always perfect, and the staff is so kind. I came in right at closing (didn't realize it was early, holiday weekend) and the owner still let me place an order. Wonderful folks!!
We love the drinks here! Every experience has been great and the staff is always friendly.
Really good. Recommend 70% sweetness on the boba can be really sweet normally.
Everyone there is amazing, please support this local treasure!
Amazing! I got the Oreo cookie boba tea and I should have got a large 🤣

My favorite boba tea! They are super sweet. I love how they make it like a slushie, it’s unique. They NEVER mess up my drink and make it so fast. Also their sandwiches are delicious and so healthy.  Prices are average.

AMAZING!!!
I’ve been to this place three different times now and tried something new each visit, boba, coffee, and even a mangonada, and every single one was a hit! Seriously, they never miss.

They also have macarons and other desserts that are just as delicious (dangerously so, honestly). And the customer service? Top-tier. Everyone is super sweet and welcoming, it always feels like a little treat just walking in.

Highly recommend if you’re in the mood for something tasty, refreshing, and a good vibe all around!

The drinks are delicious! True authentic Vietnamese coffee flavor! The tropical tea with real fruits were so refreshing in hot weather. The banh mi are crispy and display great balance of all ingredients! The owners are very tentative and the store is spotless. Highly recommended.
Won a free drink off IG. Thanks J Tea. This is strawberry bubble tea with mango popping pearls. We also got mango with strawberry pearls.
J tea is amazing! I love the strawberry milk tea, salted caramel latte & all of the sandwiches are amazing! Definitely worth going! Staff and owners are so kind!

I love J Tea! It was one of the first boba tea places that opened up near us a few years ago and we were thrilled to know that they also served Banh mi (a staple Vietnamese sandwich made with French baguettes, filled with an array of different types of meats, pickled carrots and daikon radish, cilantro, jalapeños, cucumbers with a pate spread on one bread and a buttery aioli on the other). Our favorite is the classic J Special. It is delicious! We also enjoy ordering their orange slushy for the kids, for the adults iced cafe sua de (Vietnamese iced coffee with condensed milk) and I enjoy the lychee black tea with grass jelly. The owner is always so nice. We come back time and time again and are never disappointed. Thanks J Tea!
If you're looking for the best Vietnamese coffee in town, this place is a must-visit. The friendly staff really make you feel welcome and appreciated! 💖
I’m not a bubble tea expert by any means, but from the few that I’ve had in NYC or in Charlotte, this place definitely is one of the best.
The teas and drinks are incredibly refreshing, and I particularly love the strawberry lemonade. The customer service is outstanding, and the owners are genuinely friendly.

huge selection, comparable prices, me and three 10 year olds all enjoyed our boba, and they have 2 tables inside and one outside.  Its also around the corner from “a cube” shopping center so if you want to go as part of a social experience, and walk around the cube, it’s something to do especially for tween/ teens.  There’s few places to do this in 2025 compared to when I grew up in the late 80’s/90’s.
The best Boba tea in the Carolinas! We have loved everything we've tried, and the owners are the sweetest! Great service and a great place to stop for lunch or a yummy drink.
Our go to place for boba and banh mi. The customer service is top notch and everything is delicious. We frequent a couple times of week
My daughter always says that she wants me to get her some Jtea boba!
Homemade and super fresh food and drinks prepared by the owner. Highly recommend J Tea.
This place is amazing. I love the lemongrass pork banh mi sandwich. The milk teas and the iced Vietnamese coffee are so bomb. J Tea doesn’t disappoint. 🤌🏻
Best boba around! The sea salt cream is delicious and service is great! The bahn mi is also super yummy and cheap.
absolutely love going to this place eddie and jody are awesome people will continue to go back to them for more boba
Great tea and slushies, Eddie and Jody are super friendly.
Absolutely delicious. First time pork bahnmi and honeydew bubble tea and it was amazing
The food and drinks here are SOO GOOODDDDDDDD. This is my go-to banh mi place, coming from an SEA. The staff is aight, I never really talked to them too much. And the free dum dums are nice too.
I love this place!!! every drink i've had is fantastic and i love the tofu bahn mi. the service is quick and everyone is so kind. recommend to every one!

I didn't even know this place existed until a month ago, the end of July. This place is sooo Neat-o!! I cannot wait to go bk and try some more boba drinks, try their food, and get some more crocheted gifts!! I looove my paw print purse and the boba Keychain. The owners aunt makes them all!! Super talented lady!! 💚💙🩷🔥🙌💪🛐🙏🏼🫶💯💛💗♥️🥰🫂👏👏👏👏😌🥰❤️‍🔥
Sooo yummy!!
I love the coconut bubble tea! The staff provides exceptional service, especially the tall blonde lady, Addison. I will be coming back here often!! 😄

Just visited this establishment.  Young girl working the register taking my order was strumming her fingers through her hair non-stop...that was a big no-no for me. That is very unsanitary! I lost all interest at that point.  Do better please.

My fiancé and I come here literally every day. Their viet coffee and blended taro are to DIE for. I now refuse to drink any other coffee or taro unless it’s from Jtea. Do yourself a favor and TRY THIS PLACE!!!
Ban Mi was amazing!!
My friends and family go here all the time. Great all around never had a bad time.
I couldn’t believe how fast their service was.  I accidentally ordered the wrong thing, they fixed it within 3 minutes and seemed happy to do it.  Very impressed!
love this place! so yummy! everyone’s so nice here too
Salt Coffee is so delicious, very balanced flavors and boba tea is very Yummy !!!!
They have great bubble tea. The coconut and taro milk teas are delicious! For kids, honeydew bubble tea is awesome! The staff are always welcoming and professional. Highly recommend!

In my off route back to Columbia I literally stumbled upon J Tea. I passed it twice before I really noticed it. Thank God for bringing me back to it! This small, modern and clean facility hides enormous punches! Hospitality was on par from the beginning because of the helpful staff. Next the passion fruit tea was just right sweet to herbal notes. Then that pork sandwich... Wow! The bread was warm, with a crispy outside and soft interior. The pork chunks were flavorful and moist. Then the fresh toppings gave me euphoria! I was in search of something good, fresh, not greasy or that would weigh me down and this slightly sweet, slightly spicy was just what I needed! Mad I didn't order another one! Will be back when I'm in town for sure!

I’m a regular at J Tea. I always order their coconut milk tea with boba and the J special banh mi when I’m craving it. The coconut milk tea is my favorite here. So yummy. Their banh mi is delicious. The bread is nicely crisp and warm. It’s soft upon first bite through to the end. You will not be disappointed. Great place to grab boba, in and out.
Stopped in for the first time and was beyond impressed with my experience. I can't wait to go back. Super nice people and delicious drinks
I always go here after I go to Goodwill. The best pick is the Strawberry and Brown sugar boba drink! I definitely recommend.
I walked in and it’s really nice inside but I was being stared at by workers because I was wearing my traditional clothing in the store so…. You could probably guess how that felt
Great place to get boba tea and banh mi!  My family come here often especially when they first opened as Fort Mill’s 1st ever boba tea and banh mi shop!  The owners and staff are great.
Everything was absolutely fantastic! The Thai tea is DELICIOUS!!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Jacky P,
While we are glad that you enjoyed our drinks, we apologize for the issue that you had with our team member! She is our new member so she couldn't answer some of your questions about our menu. Thus, she asked our manager to take your order so that he could explain all your questions clearly. Sometimes the customers have questions about drinks or sandwiches, our team member also need our manager's help to serve the customers the best. We always would like to satisfy all customers not only with our drinks and food but also with our customer service. Once again, we apologize this and thank you for your business!
reviews_data.review_text:
I’ve never felt so uncomfortable at a location before. We went up to the counter to place our order the lady didn’t try assisting us she simply turned away and asked the owner to assist us. It felt like she didn’t want to bother help black people. Regardless we sat there the owner was really nice and his drinks were fresh. But over all I felt unwelcome simply wanted to cry grab my kids and walk out. The hardest was sitting there and watch her serve every single white person and family that came after us.
I won’t be returning there.

i've been drinking boba for YEARS and i’ve never had boba as good as this!! i have yet to try their food, but i’m being so serious their boba is freaking amazing and i’m so happy because it’s so close to where i live in comparison to other boba places in the charlotte area!!! if you live far away it is SO worth the drive, my favorite is the brown sugar milk tea but no matter what you get it’s gonna be so good please go here
I love going here, the tea is always good and the staff is always super nice, definitely recommend
BEST BOBA in clt.the ones where I live not to good. Thus place is perfect  Not to sweet nor les just PERFECT. DEFINITELY RECOMEND.

Went here to get a drink with my boyfriend and was met with exceptional service. We had our first date here and went back for memories and we’re not disappointed. The worker Ilaria was super nice and gave us new drink recommendations which were 10/10

Best boba in the CLT area. We drive from Lake Wylie and it’s worth it! Such a nice staff, clean shop, and extensive menu. Obsessed with their bubble teas!! Our favorite drinks are the Brown Sugar bubble tea, Taro bubble tea, and sea salt coffee with coffee jelly. The kids love brown sugar milk tea with boba, any honeydew drink, any strawberry drink, and the slushies. Love supporting businesses like this 🤍
Hands down THE BEST BOBA TEA! My favorite is the coconut boba tea with half sugar.
Been here twice and this is my favorite place to get bubble tea now! The vanilla strawberry flavor is my favorite so far!
I enjoy JTea’s mint chocolate bubble tea. No other boba place has it. I’m obsessed. Never take it away please lol.
Very tasty Bahn mi’s and classic milk tea flavors! Will be back in the future
This is my favorite place to get bubble tea! The blended brown sugar bubble tea is so good. Their boba is soft and flavorful. Great customer service too.
Love their matcha bubble tea.
I always get the honey dew bubble tea, the frozen one is so good and yummy 👍

The Vietnamese coffee is my favorite drink in the entire world. They have an amazing program where you get a free drink every 10 drinks you purchase. I just redeemed my reward for my free large Vietnamese coffee! The owner is very kind and always asks about my baby boy! I love this place!
Full of jellies and fruits! Love it!!
So clean, quick on my order, very nice. Good was great! I got the pork sandwich and the sunset slushy.
Best bubble tea ever
Very clean and drinks are creative and tasty
Heard of this place from a neighbor in passing, and spotted it while driving home. Had to make a stop and so glad I stopped. Got a Thai iced tea and tofu sandwich, amazing!!
Bahn Mi’s were good
I ordered the Thai tea and a passion fruit tea which was a 10/10. I also ordered a banh mi Sandwich which I would say it’s a 8/10. Overall great experience and will be a returning customer.
Love the boba!!

I cant believe we have a place of this quality in Fort Mill! Locally owned and a family business and best of all the variety and craftsmanship that goes into their boba tea is unmatched. Service is always friendly as well. If you have not gone, you need to go fast!
I love all products here. I am confuse with all the menus. They have way too many with the same items and it’s overwhelming.
Best Bubble Tea ever! So yummy!
Excellent bubble tea. The bobas are so soft

Loved the avocado bubble tea ! It was just perfect ! Just enough sweet and fresh ingredients made it a light refreshing drink for the summer heat . The options are umpteen and you can mix and match to your liking which makes it an exciting stop for sure ! Looking forward to going back again .

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Dietary restrictions, Parking, Kid-friendliness

reviews_data.review_text: i love this place SO MUCH!!!! ESPECIALLY because there is this really cute gorl that works there. and she is so hot and sweet and I want to marry her. ♾️/10
Unique shop with great drinks, boba and infused fruit teas.  Highly recommend grabbing a tasty Banh Mi while you're there, you won't be disappointed.

Asked for taro milk tea boba
Got a taro slush
The boba balls were warm with a slush on top.

Also tastes more like milk than anything.

Do not recommend.

amazing Taste I ordered The vietnamese Sea salt Coffee  .  guys You all should stop By at the new Location at fort mill
South Carolina
I love it love it . only 10 mins from Breve Wick
Thai boba was delicious, thank you for the recommendation!

If you are into Vietnamese Iced Coffee and Vietnamese Sandwich, J Tea is a right match.
They also have many boba tea, slushies, and even Mangonada.
Service: 10/10
Price: 10/10
Nice place with friendly staff. My little one doesn’t like green tea, so they replaced that with water for her fruit slashie. Appreciate that!

The tea tasted really good, but the boba was very chewy and  it didn’t pop.
My kids were disappointed with the boba part of their bubble teas.
Friendly service. Very clean place. Delicious drinks!
Great i loved it
Had a coffee from here the other day. It was delicious. Will def be back!
Just yummy! My favorite drink is the taro milk tea with boba. Their sandwiches are also delicious. I definitely recommend them!

Very pleasant experience. Friendly staff, good boba teas and tasty sandwiches. I placed an order for a pick up and while waiting i was offered a cup of water - small gesture but it made me feel welcomed. Will definitely be back.
Love it! Nice small cute little place. The milk tea is very good! Quite rich. Would recommend!
Great sandwich selection
great place to get Boba and lunch with friends! there's not a lot of seating but i've always been able to sit when i've gone in :) the bánh mìs are so good!
Completely obsessed with this place :)
Amazing experience! I tried the coconut boba tea and it was really good. The staff is very nice as well :)
The best boba tea and bahn mi in south Charlotte/Fort Mill. It is great to find great food that is outside of South End for once. Match Green Tea is my go-to but the taro and melon are great too.
Great options and very tasteful flavors. Kids like the boba and the fruity poppers. Banh mi sandwiches are very good
Super fresh ingredient sandwich on delicious bread!!
Absolutely delicious food and drinks, helpful staff, and reasonable prices.
Nice to find a good boba place that isn’t all the way in Charlotte! Would recommend trying.

I was really excited to hear we had a bahn mi place open up so close to us and finally got by there today.

Sandwich was fresh and tasty with crusty bread that makes it just right. Peach tea and macaroons were delicious as well.
Yum, yum, yum! Bubble tea, and sandwiches were very tasty.

Delicious. Pearls with syrup are my favorite. If you are trying for the first time I recommend milk tea with strawberry pearls. Always delicious choice! Also big one was too much for me, so I recommend regular size for first time try. If you like Jasmine then Jasmine milk tea is just amazing! Enjoy! We loved the milk teas flavors that we got. Nice atmosphere inside and friendly staff members, will definitely be back soon on sunny day next time. Free wifi access, delicious drink, great place to bring your kids and get tasty drinks!
VERY GOOD!!! Grilled Bahn mi and strawberry boba is to die for!

I LOVE this place! The sandwiches are delicious and they have a huge selection of bubble teas,fruit teas,slushies and more. Since they opened I've visited multiple times a week,I can't stop craving their food and tea.
Bonus the owners are very nice. Come check it out and support these good people's small business.
Banh mi chicken was great and priced well!
good milk tea, a bit warm for some reason but there was ice so after a bit it was good 👍
THAT BUBBLE TEA BUSS. It’s so good! The staff is really nice as well. My dad loves the sandwich and wanted another one a couple hours later.
Very delicious sandwiches and boba drinks. Good service also.

If I could give more stars I would!! Fantastic boba and great sandwhich. Might seriously be my favorite place around here! Will be my mew go to spot!! - very good pricing, nice and patient staff, a great vibe!
So glad Tega Cay finally has a boba shop! I got a Thai milk tea with boba and it was delicious! Will definitely be back!!
Yummy bubble tea and great service! So excited to have this in Ft. Mill!

I came here for their soft opening and they did a wonderful job with my banh mi sandwich and Vietnamese coffee! The banh mi dac biet (J Tea’s special combination) was well toasted and flavorful and the meat:bread:vegetable ratio was spot on. The Vietnamese iced coffee was strong and refreshing. The service was fast and very friendly. I will definitely be coming back to get more banh mi sandwiches, coffee, and try their bubble tea!

I’ve never had such good boba in my life, and I’ve had lots of boba! The Oreo cookie bubble tea with almond milk was amazing and had lots of Oreos on top which I loved 🤩  I’m going to be here all the time now😍😍
Very friendly staff and great boba tea's
Went during the soft opening and it was great! Some of the best boba i’ve had :)
Super cute space! Finally a bubble tea place in the area! Try the drink with chopped apples and mangoes if you really want to experience life at the highest level.
HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!! 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
Very good foo and drinks

Man oh man!!

J Tea’s is great. It’s quite easy to see from the street and has two entrances so if you miss the first one (like I did) don’t panic.

The have a few places inside to sit and eat which includes a live edge wooden slab against the window to look out. I really dig the repurposed pallets as tables. They were sanded smooth and sealed so no chance of splinters.

The Manager, Eddie, was extremely friendly and didn’t mind small talk as I waited for my food.

Desserts!!! Macaroons and cheese cakes!! New York or Green Tea cheesecakes!

I got the J Special, I believe it was called for my sandwich. This banh mi is what most people expect when ordering. Everything was proportioned perfectly. There wasn’t too much pickled radish and carrots, the jalapeños were just enough and the baguette!! Holy hell the baguette!! Soft and warm inside and crunchy on the outside like a French baguette should be.

I’ve never had Vietnamese coffee (espresso and condensed milk) with tapioca balls in it so that did throw me off a bit but it wasn’t bad. I guess I’ll find out how strong it is in about 15 minutes.

All and all, this place is great. I’m super excited to have them in Fort Mill. It will save me about 40 minutes of driving to Charlotte when I want one.

Just as a side note: the card machine to pay does NOT have a place to add a tip. I mentioned it to Eddie but he reassured me that they do cash tips because all 100% of the tips go to the employees. I imagine with all the cars sales and lack of cash sales that it would get difficult to tip out consistently when your cash flow in is less than what you need to tip out.  So bring a couple bucks to throw in the jar for the employees.

reviews_data.review_text: I love Vietnamese coffee and Thai tea — I asked the lovely folks if they could mix them, they said they have never done that but they’ll give it a shot. It is… literally the best thing in the world. I’ve been smiling for like 5 minutes, I’m so jazzed about it. Yall are so sweet and this made my super rough day so much better. Thank yall again 💛💛💛

The only boba place I’ll go to here in the area! They make the best drinks and boba! My favorite is their j milk tea, but all the drinks I’ve had are amazing. The tapioca boba is always fully cooked (unlike Kung fu tea down the road) and the staff here is so kind. The sandwiches are also delicious especially the pork roll. Could not recommend this place enough!
I love j tea it’s so good and the managers are so nice!!

My girlfriend and I have gotten very into boba in the last few weeks. We have tried probably 10 spots in the Charlotte area, and this is by far our favorite. They’re so nice every time we go in, as well.
Best boba tea I have ever had! The staff is also incredibly nice and helpful!
Best Boba in town.
Bahn Mi was great. Bread was exceptional
Had the sea salt coffee, peachy breeze, and J special Banh Mi (dac biet).. all were delicious! I'll definitely be back ;)
Lovely little boba tea place hidden away in fort mill, The yogurt boba is to die for and I tried a bahn mi sandwich for the first time here and it was delicious! Absolutely on my lunch roster now.
We go Here ALL the time its always so refreshing SUCH good quality ingredients not filled with sugar. Definitely one of the way better bubble tea ive had. Staff is extremely friendly! Love this place
The Vietnamese sandwiches are so fresh and unique. I try to treat myself once a week and always look forward to it.
Great service and menu options. 🤍
the best
Incredible bahn mi, incredible drinks, incredible atmosphere and service. Highly recommend the absolute passion fruit drink and the dau hu sandwich.

I can't sing this place's praises enough. The drinks and sandwiches are always perfect, and the staff is so kind. I came in right at closing (didn't realize it was early, holiday weekend) and the owner still let me place an order. Wonderful folks!!
We love the drinks here! Every experience has been great and the staff is always friendly.
Really good. Recommend 70% sweetness on the boba can be really sweet normally.
Everyone there is amazing, please support this local treasure!
Amazing! I got the Oreo cookie boba tea and I should have got a large 🤣

My favorite boba tea! They are super sweet. I love how they make it like a slushie, it’s unique. They NEVER mess up my drink and make it so fast. Also their sandwiches are delicious and so healthy.  Prices are average.

AMAZING!!!
I’ve been to this place three different times now and tried something new each visit, boba, coffee, and even a mangonada, and every single one was a hit! Seriously, they never miss.

They also have macarons and other desserts that are just as delicious (dangerously so, honestly). And the customer service? Top-tier. Everyone is super sweet and welcoming, it always feels like a little treat just walking in.

Highly recommend if you’re in the mood for something tasty, refreshing, and a good vibe all around!

The drinks are delicious! True authentic Vietnamese coffee flavor! The tropical tea with real fruits were so refreshing in hot weather. The banh mi are crispy and display great balance of all ingredients! The owners are very tentative and the store is spotless. Highly recommended.
Won a free drink off IG. Thanks J Tea. This is strawberry bubble tea with mango popping pearls. We also got mango with strawberry pearls.
J tea is amazing! I love the strawberry milk tea, salted caramel latte & all of the sandwiches are amazing! Definitely worth going! Staff and owners are so kind!

I love J Tea! It was one of the first boba tea places that opened up near us a few years ago and we were thrilled to know that they also served Banh mi (a staple Vietnamese sandwich made with French baguettes, filled with an array of different types of meats, pickled carrots and daikon radish, cilantro, jalapeños, cucumbers with a pate spread on one bread and a buttery aioli on the other). Our favorite is the classic J Special. It is delicious! We also enjoy ordering their orange slushy for the kids, for the adults iced cafe sua de (Vietnamese iced coffee with condensed milk) and I enjoy the lychee black tea with grass jelly. The owner is always so nice. We come back time and time again and are never disappointed. Thanks J Tea!
If you're looking for the best Vietnamese coffee in town, this place is a must-visit. The friendly staff really make you feel welcome and appreciated! 💖
I’m not a bubble tea expert by any means, but from the few that I’ve had in NYC or in Charlotte, this place definitely is one of the best.
The teas and drinks are incredibly refreshing, and I particularly love the strawberry lemonade. The customer service is outstanding, and the owners are genuinely friendly.

huge selection, comparable prices, me and three 10 year olds all enjoyed our boba, and they have 2 tables inside and one outside.  Its also around the corner from “a cube” shopping center so if you want to go as part of a social experience, and walk around the cube, it’s something to do especially for tween/ teens.  There’s few places to do this in 2025 compared to when I grew up in the late 80’s/90’s.
The best Boba tea in the Carolinas! We have loved everything we've tried, and the owners are the sweetest! Great service and a great place to stop for lunch or a yummy drink.
Our go to place for boba and banh mi. The customer service is top notch and everything is delicious. We frequent a couple times of week
My daughter always says that she wants me to get her some Jtea boba!
Homemade and super fresh food and drinks prepared by the owner. Highly recommend J Tea.
This place is amazing. I love the lemongrass pork banh mi sandwich. The milk teas and the iced Vietnamese coffee are so bomb. J Tea doesn’t disappoint. 🤌🏻
Best boba around! The sea salt cream is delicious and service is great! The bahn mi is also super yummy and cheap.
absolutely love going to this place eddie and jody are awesome people will continue to go back to them for more boba
Great tea and slushies, Eddie and Jody are super friendly.
Absolutely delicious. First time pork bahnmi and honeydew bubble tea and it was amazing
The food and drinks here are SOO GOOODDDDDDDD. This is my go-to banh mi place, coming from an SEA. The staff is aight, I never really talked to them too much. And the free dum dums are nice too.
I love this place!!! every drink i've had is fantastic and i love the tofu bahn mi. the service is quick and everyone is so kind. recommend to every one!

I didn't even know this place existed until a month ago, the end of July. This place is sooo Neat-o!! I cannot wait to go bk and try some more boba drinks, try their food, and get some more crocheted gifts!! I looove my paw print purse and the boba Keychain. The owners aunt makes them all!! Super talented lady!! 💚💙🩷🔥🙌💪🛐🙏🏼🫶💯💛💗♥️🥰🫂👏👏👏👏😌🥰❤️‍🔥
Sooo yummy!!
I love the coconut bubble tea! The staff provides exceptional service, especially the tall blonde lady, Addison. I will be coming back here often!! 😄

Just visited this establishment.  Young girl working the register taking my order was strumming her fingers through her hair non-stop...that was a big no-no for me. That is very unsanitary! I lost all interest at that point.  Do better please.

My fiancé and I come here literally every day. Their viet coffee and blended taro are to DIE for. I now refuse to drink any other coffee or taro unless it’s from Jtea. Do yourself a favor and TRY THIS PLACE!!!
Ban Mi was amazing!!
My friends and family go here all the time. Great all around never had a bad time.
I couldn’t believe how fast their service was.  I accidentally ordered the wrong thing, they fixed it within 3 minutes and seemed happy to do it.  Very impressed!
love this place! so yummy! everyone’s so nice here too
Salt Coffee is so delicious, very balanced flavors and boba tea is very Yummy !!!!
They have great bubble tea. The coconut and taro milk teas are delicious! For kids, honeydew bubble tea is awesome! The staff are always welcoming and professional. Highly recommend!

In my off route back to Columbia I literally stumbled upon J Tea. I passed it twice before I really noticed it. Thank God for bringing me back to it! This small, modern and clean facility hides enormous punches! Hospitality was on par from the beginning because of the helpful staff. Next the passion fruit tea was just right sweet to herbal notes. Then that pork sandwich... Wow! The bread was warm, with a crispy outside and soft interior. The pork chunks were flavorful and moist. Then the fresh toppings gave me euphoria! I was in search of something good, fresh, not greasy or that would weigh me down and this slightly sweet, slightly spicy was just what I needed! Mad I didn't order another one! Will be back when I'm in town for sure!

I’m a regular at J Tea. I always order their coconut milk tea with boba and the J special banh mi when I’m craving it. The coconut milk tea is my favorite here. So yummy. Their banh mi is delicious. The bread is nicely crisp and warm. It’s soft upon first bite through to the end. You will not be disappointed. Great place to grab boba, in and out.
Stopped in for the first time and was beyond impressed with my experience. I can't wait to go back. Super nice people and delicious drinks
I always go here after I go to Goodwill. The best pick is the Strawberry and Brown sugar boba drink! I definitely recommend.
I walked in and it’s really nice inside but I was being stared at by workers because I was wearing my traditional clothing in the store so…. You could probably guess how that felt
Great place to get boba tea and banh mi!  My family come here often especially when they first opened as Fort Mill’s 1st ever boba tea and banh mi shop!  The owners and staff are great.
Everything was absolutely fantastic! The Thai tea is DELICIOUS!!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Jacky P,
While we are glad that you enjoyed our drinks, we apologize for the issue that you had with our team member! She is our new member so she couldn't answer some of your questions about our menu. Thus, she asked our manager to take your order so that he could explain all your questions clearly. Sometimes the customers have questions about drinks or sandwiches, our team member also need our manager's help to serve the customers the best. We always would like to satisfy all customers not only with our drinks and food but also with our customer service. Once again, we apologize this and thank you for your business!
reviews_data.review_text:
I’ve never felt so uncomfortable at a location before. We went up to the counter to place our order the lady didn’t try assisting us she simply turned away and asked the owner to assist us. It felt like she didn’t want to bother help black people. Regardless we sat there the owner was really nice and his drinks were fresh. But over all I felt unwelcome simply wanted to cry grab my kids and walk out. The hardest was sitting there and watch her serve every single white person and family that came after us.
I won’t be returning there.

i've been drinking boba for YEARS and i’ve never had boba as good as this!! i have yet to try their food, but i’m being so serious their boba is freaking amazing and i’m so happy because it’s so close to where i live in comparison to other boba places in the charlotte area!!! if you live far away it is SO worth the drive, my favorite is the brown sugar milk tea but no matter what you get it’s gonna be so good please go here
I love going here, the tea is always good and the staff is always super nice, definitely recommend
BEST BOBA in clt.the ones where I live not to good. Thus place is perfect  Not to sweet nor les just PERFECT. DEFINITELY RECOMEND.

Went here to get a drink with my boyfriend and was met with exceptional service. We had our first date here and went back for memories and we’re not disappointed. The worker Ilaria was super nice and gave us new drink recommendations which were 10/10

Best boba in the CLT area. We drive from Lake Wylie and it’s worth it! Such a nice staff, clean shop, and extensive menu. Obsessed with their bubble teas!! Our favorite drinks are the Brown Sugar bubble tea, Taro bubble tea, and sea salt coffee with coffee jelly. The kids love brown sugar milk tea with boba, any honeydew drink, any strawberry drink, and the slushies. Love supporting businesses like this 🤍
Hands down THE BEST BOBA TEA! My favorite is the coconut boba tea with half sugar.
Been here twice and this is my favorite place to get bubble tea now! The vanilla strawberry flavor is my favorite so far!
I enjoy JTea’s mint chocolate bubble tea. No other boba place has it. I’m obsessed. Never take it away please lol.
Very tasty Bahn mi’s and classic milk tea flavors! Will be back in the future
This is my favorite place to get bubble tea! The blended brown sugar bubble tea is so good. Their boba is soft and flavorful. Great customer service too.
Love their matcha bubble tea.
I always get the honey dew bubble tea, the frozen one is so good and yummy 👍

The Vietnamese coffee is my favorite drink in the entire world. They have an amazing program where you get a free drink every 10 drinks you purchase. I just redeemed my reward for my free large Vietnamese coffee! The owner is very kind and always asks about my baby boy! I love this place!
Full of jellies and fruits! Love it!!
So clean, quick on my order, very nice. Good was great! I got the pork sandwich and the sunset slushy.
Best bubble tea ever
Very clean and drinks are creative and tasty
Heard of this place from a neighbor in passing, and spotted it while driving home. Had to make a stop and so glad I stopped. Got a Thai iced tea and tofu sandwich, amazing!!
Bahn Mi’s were good
I ordered the Thai tea and a passion fruit tea which was a 10/10. I also ordered a banh mi Sandwich which I would say it’s a 8/10. Overall great experience and will be a returning customer.
Love the boba!!

I cant believe we have a place of this quality in Fort Mill! Locally owned and a family business and best of all the variety and craftsmanship that goes into their boba tea is unmatched. Service is always friendly as well. If you have not gone, you need to go fast!
I love all products here. I am confuse with all the menus. They have way too many with the same items and it’s overwhelming.
Best Bubble Tea ever! So yummy!
Excellent bubble tea. The bobas are so soft

Loved the avocado bubble tea ! It was just perfect ! Just enough sweet and fresh ingredients made it a light refreshing drink for the summer heat . The options are umpteen and you can mix and match to your liking which makes it an exciting stop for sure ! Looking forward to going back again .

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Dietary restrictions, Parking, Kid-friendliness

reviews_data.review_text: i love this place SO MUCH!!!! ESPECIALLY because there is this really cute gorl that works there. and she is so hot and sweet and I want to marry her. ♾️/10
Unique shop with great drinks, boba and infused fruit teas.  Highly recommend grabbing a tasty Banh Mi while you're there, you won't be disappointed.

Asked for taro milk tea boba
Got a taro slush
The boba balls were warm with a slush on top.

Also tastes more like milk than anything.

Do not recommend.

amazing Taste I ordered The vietnamese Sea salt Coffee  .  guys You all should stop By at the new Location at fort mill
South Carolina
I love it love it . only 10 mins from Breve Wick
Thai boba was delicious, thank you for the recommendation!

If you are into Vietnamese Iced Coffee and Vietnamese Sandwich, J Tea is a right match.
They also have many boba tea, slushies, and even Mangonada.
Service: 10/10
Price: 10/10
Nice place with friendly staff. My little one doesn’t like green tea, so they replaced that with water for her fruit slashie. Appreciate that!

The tea tasted really good, but the boba was very chewy and  it didn’t pop.
My kids were disappointed with the boba part of their bubble teas.
Friendly service. Very clean place. Delicious drinks!
Great i loved it
Had a coffee from here the other day. It was delicious. Will def be back!
Just yummy! My favorite drink is the taro milk tea with boba. Their sandwiches are also delicious. I definitely recommend them!

Very pleasant experience. Friendly staff, good boba teas and tasty sandwiches. I placed an order for a pick up and while waiting i was offered a cup of water - small gesture but it made me feel welcomed. Will definitely be back.
Love it! Nice small cute little place. The milk tea is very good! Quite rich. Would recommend!
Great sandwich selection
great place to get Boba and lunch with friends! there's not a lot of seating but i've always been able to sit when i've gone in :) the bánh mìs are so good!
Completely obsessed with this place :)
Amazing experience! I tried the coconut boba tea and it was really good. The staff is very nice as well :)
The best boba tea and bahn mi in south Charlotte/Fort Mill. It is great to find great food that is outside of South End for once. Match Green Tea is my go-to but the taro and melon are great too.
Great options and very tasteful flavors. Kids like the boba and the fruity poppers. Banh mi sandwiches are very good
Super fresh ingredient sandwich on delicious bread!!
Absolutely delicious food and drinks, helpful staff, and reasonable prices.
Nice to find a good boba place that isn’t all the way in Charlotte! Would recommend trying.

I was really excited to hear we had a bahn mi place open up so close to us and finally got by there today.

Sandwich was fresh and tasty with crusty bread that makes it just right. Peach tea and macaroons were delicious as well.
Yum, yum, yum! Bubble tea, and sandwiches were very tasty.

Delicious. Pearls with syrup are my favorite. If you are trying for the first time I recommend milk tea with strawberry pearls. Always delicious choice! Also big one was too much for me, so I recommend regular size for first time try. If you like Jasmine then Jasmine milk tea is just amazing! Enjoy! We loved the milk teas flavors that we got. Nice atmosphere inside and friendly staff members, will definitely be back soon on sunny day next time. Free wifi access, delicious drink, great place to bring your kids and get tasty drinks!
VERY GOOD!!! Grilled Bahn mi and strawberry boba is to die for!

I LOVE this place! The sandwiches are delicious and they have a huge selection of bubble teas,fruit teas,slushies and more. Since they opened I've visited multiple times a week,I can't stop craving their food and tea.
Bonus the owners are very nice. Come check it out and support these good people's small business.
Banh mi chicken was great and priced well!
good milk tea, a bit warm for some reason but there was ice so after a bit it was good 👍
THAT BUBBLE TEA BUSS. It’s so good! The staff is really nice as well. My dad loves the sandwich and wanted another one a couple hours later.
Very delicious sandwiches and boba drinks. Good service also.

If I could give more stars I would!! Fantastic boba and great sandwhich. Might seriously be my favorite place around here! Will be my mew go to spot!! - very good pricing, nice and patient staff, a great vibe!
So glad Tega Cay finally has a boba shop! I got a Thai milk tea with boba and it was delicious! Will definitely be back!!
Yummy bubble tea and great service! So excited to have this in Ft. Mill!

I came here for their soft opening and they did a wonderful job with my banh mi sandwich and Vietnamese coffee! The banh mi dac biet (J Tea’s special combination) was well toasted and flavorful and the meat:bread:vegetable ratio was spot on. The Vietnamese iced coffee was strong and refreshing. The service was fast and very friendly. I will definitely be coming back to get more banh mi sandwiches, coffee, and try their bubble tea!

I’ve never had such good boba in my life, and I’ve had lots of boba! The Oreo cookie bubble tea with almond milk was amazing and had lots of Oreos on top which I loved 🤩  I’m going to be here all the time now😍😍
Very friendly staff and great boba tea's
Went during the soft opening and it was great! Some of the best boba i’ve had :)
Super cute space! Finally a bubble tea place in the area! Try the drink with chopped apples and mangoes if you really want to experience life at the highest level.
HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!! 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
Very good foo and drinks

Man oh man!!

J Tea’s is great. It’s quite easy to see from the street and has two entrances so if you miss the first one (like I did) don’t panic.

The have a few places inside to sit and eat which includes a live edge wooden slab against the window to look out. I really dig the repurposed pallets as tables. They were sanded smooth and sealed so no chance of splinters.

The Manager, Eddie, was extremely friendly and didn’t mind small talk as I waited for my food.

Desserts!!! Macaroons and cheese cakes!! New York or Green Tea cheesecakes!

I got the J Special, I believe it was called for my sandwich. This banh mi is what most people expect when ordering. Everything was proportioned perfectly. There wasn’t too much pickled radish and carrots, the jalapeños were just enough and the baguette!! Holy hell the baguette!! Soft and warm inside and crunchy on the outside like a French baguette should be.

I’ve never had Vietnamese coffee (espresso and condensed milk) with tapioca balls in it so that did throw me off a bit but it wasn’t bad. I guess I’ll find out how strong it is in about 15 minutes.

All and all, this place is great. I’m super excited to have them in Fort Mill. It will save me about 40 minutes of driving to Charlotte when I want one.

Just as a side note: the card machine to pay does NOT have a place to add a tip. I mentioned it to Eddie but he reassured me that they do cash tips because all 100% of the tips go to the employees. I imagine with all the cars sales and lack of cash sales that it would get difficult to tip out consistently when your cash flow in is less than what you need to tip out.  So bring a couple bucks to throw in the jar for the employees.
